ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ip_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "property" TEXT /* Name of the setting property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of what the property does */,
  "equivalent_mod_remoteip" TEXT /* Equivalent directive in mod_remoteip for Apache servers */,
  "format" TEXT /* Expected format for the property value */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the property, if applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is currently active */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user who created or last updated the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES admin_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proxy_settings" (
  "proxy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proxy setting */,
  "property" TEXT /* Type of proxy setting (internal or trusted) */,
  "regex_pattern" TEXT /* Regular expression pattern for matching IP addresses */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the proxy setting and its purpose */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the proxy setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the proxy setting was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the proxy setting is currently active */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user who created or last updated the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proxy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proxy_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES admin_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting that was changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* The value before the change was made */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* The value after the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES ip_settings ("setting_id")
)
